Body.Content:
Add new Viva Pulse survey templates for Copilot readiness, adoption, and business value, with built-in entry points and reporting surfaced directly in the Copilot Dashboard. All Copilot templates are fully customizable in Pulse, with the ability to add or edit questions using Copilot authoring and the question library. Organizations can also easily upload pilot group users into Pulse via CSV to target surveys at the right audiences from day one.

GA date: April CY2026

Preview date: March CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Measure Copilot sentiment to change manage and scale Copilot adoption
